data.body: WS2 implemented + committed (Change-Id I28bf44f, stacked on WS1). ensures.maybe_emit_pending_hint (per-tracker pending-set cache, .ensure-hinted rate-limit via fsutil.atomic_write, fail-silent); hooked once in event_append.write_and_push (covers _seam.append_event + composer; inline committers are the accepted gap). EnsureConfig section wired + re-exported; REBAR_ENSURE_* env auto-derived; docs/config.md documents [ensure]; docs/env-vars.md re-stamped for line drift only; .ensure-hinted in _GITIGNORE. tests/interfaces/store/test_pending_hint.py (7 tests) green. make lint + typecheck + env-registry drift gate green; 306 config tests green. Not closing until Gerrit Verified +1.
